results.title: Short Sellers Making Mints on Flutter, Other Sportsbook Stocks
results.description: Posted on: May 26, 2026, 03:01h. Last updated on: May 26, 2026, 03:01h. Hedge funds up nearly $2.4 billion shorting three big-name sportsbook stocks That trio is comprised of DraftKings, Entain and Flutter There’s some evidence of modest short covering in the stocks Several marquee sportsbook stocks are favorite targets of hedge fund short sellers [...] The post Short Sellers Making Mints on Flutter, Other Sportsbook Stocks appeared first on NYT News Today .

results.title: Everlane Founder Michael Preysman Weighs in on the Shein Sale—and Reveals His New Project
results.description: On May 17, rumors broke that Shein had acquired Everlane. If it wasn’t officially confirmed three days later, it would read as satire: a brand that became popular for its commitments to radical transparency and sustainability is now under the umbrella of a brand known for its opaque practices and mass production.
